+title: Implement MLXFoundationModelsSessionBackend wrapping LanguageModelSession
+---
+## What
+
+Implement the live `LanguageModelSessionBackend` conformance in `Sources/FoundationModelsRouter/Resolution/LiveModelLoader.swift`. The existing `MLXFoundationModelsContainer` becomes the factory; a new `MLXFoundationModelsSessionBackend` class wraps the live `LanguageModelSession`.
+
+**New type** `MLXFoundationModelsSessionBackend` (in `LiveModelLoader.swift`):
+- `final class MLXFoundationModelsSessionBackend: LanguageModelSessionBackend`
+- Holds `private let session: LanguageModelSession` — created once, held for lifetime
+- Holds `private let model: MLXLanguageModel` — needed to seed forks
+- `respond(to:maxTokens:)` calls `session.respond(to:options:)` (same logic as today, minus session construction)
+- `streamResponse(to:maxTokens:)` calls `session.streamResponse(to:options:)` with the existing suffix-diff adapter
+- `respond(to:following:maxTokens:)` calls `session.respond(to:schema:options:)` via `RuntimeJSONSchemaConverter`
+- `makeFork(instructions:grammar:)` reads `session.transcript` and constructs a new `LanguageModelSession(model: model, tools: [], transcript: session.transcript)`, wrapping it in a fresh `MLXFoundationModelsSessionBackend`
+
+**Update** `MLXFoundationModelsContainer`:
+- Remove `respond`, `streamResponse`, `respond(following:)` — generation no longer lives here
+- Add `func makeSession(instructions: String?) -> any LanguageModelSessionBackend` that creates `LanguageModelSession(model: model, instructions: instructions)` and wraps it in `MLXFoundationModelsSessionBackend`
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+- [ ] `MLXFoundationModelsSessionBackend` exists and conforms to `LanguageModelSessionBackend`
+- [ ] `MLXFoundationModelsContainer.makeSession(instructions:)` is implemented and returns an `MLXFoundationModelsSessionBackend`
+- [ ] `makeFork(instructions:grammar:)` seeds the fork from `session.transcript` using `LanguageModelSession.init(model:tools:transcript:)`
+- [ ] The old stateless `respond`/`streamResponse` methods are removed from `MLXFoundationModelsContainer`
+- [ ] Package compiles
+
+## Tests
+- [ ] `Tests/FoundationModelsRouterIntegrationTests/LanguageModelSessionBackendTests.swift` — add a test verifying that a second `respond` call on the same session receives the prior turn in context (i.e., the model can refer back to turn 1 in turn 2); requires a live model so it is gated to integration tests
+- [ ] Add a fork test: fork a session after one turn, verify the fork's `LanguageModelSession` was seeded with the parent transcript (check `session.transcript` entries count on both sides)
+- [ ] `swift build` succeeds
+
+## Workflow
+- `/tdd` — write the integration test assertions first (they will fail), then implement `MLXFoundationModelsSessionBackend`, then run.
\ No newline at end of file

+    - `makeFork()` now does `LanguageModelSession(model: model, tools: [], transcript: liveSession.transcript)` and wraps the result in a fresh backend, so a fork is seeded from the parent's accumulated transcript instead of being an independent, context-free backend.
